RewardMeaningText: The Rest Path returns a steadier, lower mana_shard haul while preserving the stronger recovery cushion.
CityImpactMeaningText: Stability result: City A gains a smaller shard refill, but the party keeps more recovery room for the next dispatch.
RecommendationShiftText: Mana shard pressure eased without taking the Surge strain; choose Stability again if recovery matters, or Surge if stock pressure still outweighs party strain.
